bead.title: config: ResolvedConfig sealed type + accessor unit tests
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds the cli/internal/config/ResolvedConfig type with sealed-construction sentinel + requireSealed panic helper + 22 accessor methods + per-accessor unit tests asserting zero-value-after-seal behavior.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/config/resolved.go (new)
- cli/internal/config/resolved_test.go (new)

Out-of-scope:
- Resolve method (bead 2)
- LoadAndResolve helper (bead 3)
- Any production caller (bead 6+)

See TD-024 §Type Definitions §config.ResolvedConfig.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go build ./internal/config/... passes. cd cli && go test -run TestResolvedConfig ./internal/config/... passes including a zero-value test that asserts requireSealed panics with a message naming LoadAndResolve. Every accessor has a unit test; cd cli && go doc ./internal/config ResolvedConfig shows ≥22 methods.
